title: Inside Sales Executive (Swiss MNC)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Process customer enquiries, prepare quotations and sales confirmations, and ensure all sales transactions are accurately recorded in the system in line with company policies.
  • Maintain professional communication with customers, address enquiries and order status, support after-sales matters, and keep customer records up to date.
  • Collaborate with internal teams including Warehouse, Logistics, Finance, and Procurement to ensure smooth order fulfilment and operational efficiency.
  • Assist the sales team with administrative tasks, prepare sales and order tracking reports, and monitor sales performance and outstanding orders.
  • Ensure adherence to company policies, credit terms, and internal controls; maintain proper documentation; and perform ad-hoc administrative duties as assigned by management.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or degree in Mechatronics, Mechanical Engineering, or related engineering discipline.
  • Strong understanding of mechanical systems, automation and sensors.
  • Minimum of 2 years experience required.
  • Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click on the APPLY button below to send in your resume.

EA License No: 13C6305

Reg. No.: R22104949 KOH SHI MIN, JOAN (XU SHIMIN)

For candidates who applied for the advertised position is deemed to have consented to us that we may collect, use or disclose your personal information for purpose in connection with the services provided by us.

postedCompany.description:
TALENT TRADER GROUP PTE. LTD.

Talent Trader is steered by young, dynamic professionals; each of them bringing their own vast experiences from leading Banks and HR Agencies.


We provide efficient talent sourcing, recruitment and retention services that help companies acquire effective Mid-management talent.


We offer the following value-added services for a variety of Mid-management positions across industry veticals such as Banking, Marine, Offshore, Retail, IT, F&B, Education, Manufacturing and Others:


- Talent Sourcing and Recruitment

- International Recruitment

- Contract & Temporary Staffing

- Payroll Services

- Employment Passes
